reviews.review_description: Oculus go horror games getting slept on like crazy man
I expected horror and got none. Even the jumpscares weren't scary

Have has the game for ab 3 weeks. Have not finished it... tense and scary af. Very well executed by the developers. Oneeee complaint (spoiler alert)
The absurdly loud / in your face jump scare does not feel unique to this game and is anti climatic.. jump scares are cheap and will scare anyone at the right moment to begin with so... and obviously you are not rewarded for dying..but with little direction and very little lighting in the game.. i am inevitably going to fail multiple times.. the insanely loud jump scare after 3-4 times becomes annoying.. aside from that.. favorite ‘horror’ game by far.

I was bored and decided to download and play play with me... 30min.. Brain fried.SH&* MYSELF and now I can't be alone in the dark... Had night terrors that night. Was that the kinda thing you guys were going for??? 🤔

Yeah  well  after reading reviews I thought wow! This must  be something else!
I found it very boring. Sorry but did not even cause me to jump.
Very scary. My friend, who loves scary stuff put it on and screemed the house down and cryed. And she wasnt even on the first bit! Brilliant though.
Something very creepy about Michael Jackson’s voice. Other than that, not really that scary.
This is the scariest game I have ever played in my life it's incredible

reviews.review_title: Didn't really like the loud screaming
reviews.review_description: The game is very scary and movement is good. I didn't feel sick just almost broke my headphones trying to rip them out of my ears when the clown would scream. It got so frequent I knew when it would scream and be all up in my face �
Play and see for yourselves  🤡🤡🤡
How do you play the games

reviews.review_title: A bit too dark to enjoy
reviews.review_description:
I remained stuck for a long while into the first room as i thought I needed to solve the "Simon" game in order to win a 1st candle. But this game can't be played with the Oculus Go controller (colors don't highlight when you aim at them).
Then, I eventually got that you must aim at walls to see doors appear and move forward exploring the house.
It's a pity it's so dark. Of course it's necessary to create a scary ambiance, but this don't let you really identify or enjoy the different rooms.

It’s a pretty good game. The controls on the Oculus Go are weird and the graphics aren’t the best but overall a good game. But hey, that’s just my opinion. Try it for yourself and maybe you will like it.
Its really a nice game. I like it very much

reviews.review_title: The best game I prefer over SLENder
reviews.review_description:
GRaphics is very realistic very amazing, smooth gameplay and fun to have the clown scare the out of you!
You have to find 4 birthday candle to win the game.. but to be honest the clown still wins the game at the end..... spoiler!
How to play it .
I knew the clown was there and there was still no avoiding being scared sh*tless. Definitely recommend this to get a taste of scary VR games.
The game is fun finding things but as soon as u get the key n try to get our ur too late lol
